-- ----------------------------------------------------- -- Schema mydb -- ----------------------------------------------------- -- ----------------------------------------------------- -- Schema mydb -- ----------------------------------------------------- CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS `mydb` DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 ; USE `mydb` ; -- ----------------------------------------------------- -- Table `mydb`.`marcas` -- ----------------------------------------------------- CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mydb`.`marcas` ( `id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `nombre_marca` VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARACTER SET = utf8mb3; -- ----------------------------------------------------- -- Table `mydb`.`run_li_shop` -- ----------------------------------------------------- CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mydb`.`run_li_shop` ( `id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `nombre_empresa` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `telefono` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, `email` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `fecha_registro` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`id`)) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARACTER SET = utf8mb3; -- ----------------------------------------------------- -- Table `mydb`.`modelos` -- ----------------------------------------------------- CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mydb`.`modelos` ( `id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `modelo` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `stock_total` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, `costo_china` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, `fecha_registro` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `stock_minimo` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, `run_li_shop_id` INT NOT NULL, `marcas_id` INT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`), INDEX `fk_modelos_run_li_shop_idx` (`run_li_shop_id` ASC) VISIBLE, INDEX `fk_modelos_marcas1_idx` (`marcas_id` ASC) VISIBLE, CONSTRAINT `fk_modelos_run_li_shop` FOREIGN KEY (`run_li_shop_id`) REFERENCES `mydb`.`run_li_shop` (`id`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION, CONSTRAINT `fk_modelos_marcas1` FOREIGN KEY (`marcas_id`) REFERENCES `mydb`.`marcas` (`id`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARACTER SET = utf8mb3; -- ----------------------------------------------------- -- Table `mydb`.`clientes_tiendas` -- ----------------------------------------------------- CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mydb`.`clientes_tiendas` ( `id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `nombre_comercial` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `rfc_tax_id` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, `ciudad` VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`)) ENGINE = InnoDB; -- ----------------------------------------------------- -- Table `mydb`.`pedidos_surtido` -- ----------------------------------------------------- CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mydb`.`pedidos_surtido` ( `id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `fecha_pedido` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `folio_embarque` VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL, `estatus` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, `clientes_tiendas_id` INT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`), INDEX `fk_pedidos_surtido_clientes_tiendas1_idx` (`clientes_tiendas_id` ASC) VISIBLE, CONSTRAINT `fk_pedidos_surtido_clientes_tiendas1` FOREIGN KEY (`clientes_tiendas_id`) REFERENCES `mydb`.`clientes_tiendas` (`id`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION) ENGINE = InnoDB; -- ----------------------------------------------------- -- Table `mydb`.`detalle_pedido` -- ----------------------------------------------------- CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mydb`.`detalle_pedido` ( `id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `cantidad` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, `talla` DECIMAL(3,1) NOT NULL, `precio_venta` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, `modelos_id` INT NOT NULL, `pedidos_surtido_id` INT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`), INDEX `fk_detalle_pedido_modelos1_idx` (`modelos_id` ASC) VISIBLE, INDEX `fk_detalle_pedido_pedidos_surtido1_idx` (`pedidos_surtido_id` ASC) VISIBLE, CONSTRAINT `fk_detalle_pedido_modelos1` FOREIGN KEY (`modelos_id`) REFERENCES `mydb`.`modelos` (`id`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION, CONSTRAINT `fk_detalle_pedido_pedidos_surtido1` FOREIGN KEY (`pedidos_surtido_id`) REFERENCES `mydb`.`pedidos_surtido` (`id`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION) ENGINE = InnoDB;
